title: MasterCutter
description: The stonecutter is now more useful than ever with over 500 new recipes including woodcutting, enhanced base stonecutting, recycling and "un-crafting".
body:
# MasterCutter V1.6 > The **stonecutter** is now more useful than ever with **500+ new recipes** including **woodcutting**, **enhanced base stonecutting**, **recycling**, and **un-crafting**! **This presentation refers to the latest Data Pack release: Version 1.6.x.** For previous releases, check the "_Older Versions_" section, at the bottom of the page. # 📥How to Install Choose if you want to download the pure **Data Pack** version or the **Mod** version and follow the steps accordingly.
Data Pack * **1)** Download the Datapack * **2)** Chose the world you want to install the Data Pack in and navigate to its "_datapacks_" folder * **3)** Copy the downloaded Data Pack file (MasterCutter) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command
Mod * **1)** Download the Mod * **2)** Navigate to your mods folder (for the vanilla launcher the path is .minecraft/mods * **3)** Put the downloaded .jar file (MasterCutter) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command ### The Mod version of this Data Pack is compatibile with *Fabric*, *Forge* and *Quilt loader*
# 📖Features MasteCutter adds **over 500 new and useful recipes** to the stonecutter! It also provides some **quality-of-life features**, such as the possibility **to switch** between **variants of the same block** _(eg. form polished to base)_, the ability to **cut deepslate** and **stone** into their cobbled forms and/or **direct derivatives** and so much more! Discover all the new and enhanced recipes in the menus below!
🪓WoodCutting |Input -> Output|Visual Recipes| |--|--| |
1 Log/Wood/Stem/Hyphae
(stripped variants included)
🔻
  • 4 buttons
  • 2 doors
  • 4 fences
  • 1 fence gate
  • 4 planks
  • 2 pressures
  • 1 Shelf
  • 2 signs
  • 8 slabs
  • 4 stairs
  • 4 trapdoors
  • 1 stripped counterpart
1 Bamboo Block(stripped variant included)
🔻
  • 2 buttons
  • 1 door
  • 2 fences
  • 1 fence gate
  • 2 planks / mosaic
  • 4 slabs / mosaic
  • 2 stairs / mosaic
  • 1 pressure
  • 1 Shelf
  • 1 sign
  • 2 trapdoors
  • 1 stripped counterpart
| ![Log Cutting](https://i.imgur.com/HPKSRBd.png) | |Input -> Output|Visual Recipes| |--|--| |                                                      
1 Planks(any wood type)
🔻
  • 1 button
  • 1 fence
  • 2 slabs
  • 1 stair
  • 1 trapdoor
1 Bamboo Plank
🔻
  • 1 button
  • 1 fence
  • 1 bamboo mosaic
  • 2 bamboo mosaic slabs
  • 1 bamboo mosaic stair
  • 2 bamboo slabs
  • 1 bamboo stair
  • 1 trapdoor
1 Bamboo Mosaic
🔻
  • 1 button
  • 1 fence
  • 2 bamboo mosaic slabs
  • 1 bamboo mosaic stair
  • 1 bamboo planks
  • 2 bamboo slabs
  • 1 bamboo stair
  • 1 trapdoor
| ![PLanks Cutting](https://i.imgur.com/Hlc3mKx.gif) | ❗Note that the Bamboo Blocks give half the result compared to log/wood/stem/hyphae since they are worth half. The only result that is not halved is the fence gate. A Block of Bamboo will still give you 1 fence gate.
🔮Enhanced Base StoneCutting |Features List|Visual Recipes| |--|--| |
This DataPack also enhances the base stonecut-ability:
🔻

Stone Type Blocks
  • Stone can now be cut directly into cobblestone and its derivatives
  • Deepslate can now be cut directly into cobbled deepslate and its derivatives
  • Mossy variants of cobblestone and stone bricks can be converted back to their standard counterparts
  • Polished blocks (slab, stairs and walls included) can now be turned back to their unpolished forms

Copper Blocks and Cut Copper Blocks (any oxidation level and waxed variant) can now be cut in a more efficient way!
🔻

🔸1 Copper Block now can also produce:
  • 24 Bars
  • 8 Chains
  • 2 Doors
  • 4 Trapdoors
  • 4 Lighting Rods
🔸1 Cut Copper Block now can also produce:
  • 6 Bars
  • 2 Chains
  • 1 Trapdoor
  • 1 Lighting Rod

| ![Enhanced Base StoneCutting Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/I228OJB.gif)|
♻Recycling |Features List|Visual Recipes| |--|--| |
The Recycling Feature allows to cut some block derivatives such as stairs, door and trapdoors etc...

🔸1 Stair(any wood type):
  • 1 Full Block
  • 1 Slab
  • 1 Trapdoor
  • 1 Button
  • 1 Fence
🔸1 Stair(any stone like material):
  • 1 Full Block
  • 1 Slab
  • 1 Wall (if present for the material)
🔸1 Cut Copper Stair(any variant):
  • 1 Chiseled Block
  • 6 Bars
  • 2 Chains
  • 1 Trapdoor
  • 1 Slab
  • 1 Full Block
  • 1 Lightning Rod
🔸1 Chiseled Copper(any variant):
  • 6 Copper Bars
  • 2 Chains
  • 1 Trapdoor
  • 1 Full Cut Block
  • 2 Slabs
  • 1 Stair
  • 1 Lighting Rod
🔸1 Copper Grate(any variant):
  • 6 Bars
  • 2 Chains
  • 1 Trapdoor
🔸1 Copper Door(any variant):
  • 2 Trapdoor
🔸1 Door(any wood type):
  • 2 Buttons
  • 2 Fences
  • 1 pressure
  • 1 Sign
  • 1 Slab
  • 2 Trapdoors
🔸1 Trapdoor(any wood type):
  • 1 Pressure
🔸1 Fence(any wood type):
  • 1 Button
🔸1 Fence Gate(any wood type):
  • 2 Buttons
🔸1 Iron Door:
  • 2 Iron Trapdoors
🔸1 Iron Trapdoor:
  • 1 Heavy Weighted Pressure Plate
|![https://i.imgur.com/qpDMZtk.png](https://i.imgur.com/qpDMZtk.png)

|
🔨Un-crafting |Input -> Output|Visual Recipes| |--|--| |
Input (one block/item)Output
Amethyst Block4 Amethyst Shards
Prismarine4 Prismarine Shards
Prismarine Bricks9 Prismarine Shards
Dark Prismarine8 Prismarine Shards
Quartz Block4 Nether Quartz
Chiseled Quartz4 Nether Quartz
Quartz Pillar4 Nether Quartz
Smooth Quartz4 Nether Quartz
Sandstone4 Sand
Chiseled Sandstone4 Sand
Smooth Sandstone4 Sand
Cut Sandstone4 Sand
Red Sandstone4 Red Sand
Chiseled Red Sandstone4 Red Sand
Smooth Red Sandstone4 Red Sand
Cut Red Sandstone4 Red Sand
Bricks4 Brick
Mud Bricks1 Packed Mud
End Stone Bricks1 End Stone
Nether Bricks4 Nether Brick
Red Nether Bricks4 Nether Brick
Flower Pot3 Brick
Bucket (Empty Only)3 Iron Ingot
Minecart5 Iron Ingot
Hopper5 Iron Ingot
Cauldron7 Iron Ingot
Signs
(Any Wood Type)		1 Button, 2 Planks
or 1 Pressure
Hanghing Signs
(Any Wood Type)		2 Stripped
Log/Stem/Block
or 3 Iron Nugget
Rail3 Iron Nugget
Powered Rail5 Gold Nugget
Detector Rail5 Iron Nugget
Activator Rail5 Iron Nugget
| |
🕸Miscellaneous |Features List|Visual Recipes| |--|--| |
These are some miscellaneous features that don't fit in any specific category, but are still useful:
🔻
  • Mushroom Stems and Blocks can now be "stripped" like logs, exposing the pores textures
  • Cobwebs can be cut to obtain 9 strings
  • White wool can be cut to obtain 4 strings (the same amount used for creating a white wool block)
  • Iron Blocks can now be cut in the StoneCutter, providing a more convenient option to otain it's derivatives:

1 Iron Block
🔻
  • 8 Iron Chains
  • 24 Iron Bars
  • 4 Irons Doors
  • 3 Iron Trapdoors
  • You can also un-craft it like you would in a normal crafting grid
| ![Misc Recipes MasterCutter](https://i.imgur.com/8Yj7dtG.png)|
# 📤How to Uninstall
Data Pack To uninstall the **Data Pack version** you can just run /function mastercutter:uninstall command. When the uninstallation process is completed a confirmation message will be sent in the chat.
Mod To uninstall the **Mod version** you need to run /function mastercutter:uninstall command. Then you close the game and remove the **jar** file from your .minecraft/mods folder.
## 🔗External links ## 💾Older Versions

🔮Enhanced Base StoneCutting |Features List|Visual Recipes •1| |--|--| |
This DataPack/Mod also enhance the base stonecut-ability:
🔻

Stone Type Blocks
  • Stone can now be cut directly into cobblestone and its derivatives
  • Deepslate can now be cut directly into cobbled deepslate and its derivatives
  • Mossy variants of cobblestone and stone bricks can be converted back to their standard counterparts
  • Polished blocks (slab, stairs and walls included) can now be turned back to their unpolished forms

Copper Blocks (all variants)
  • Copper Blocks can now be cut
    in a more efficient way! 1 Copper block (any variant) now can also produce:
    • 4 Copper Door
    • 4 Copper Trapdoor
|![Enhanced Base StoneCutting Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/4dSZEk3.gif)| |Visual Recipes •2 (Copper Blocks-All Variants)| |--| |![Copper Blocks Enhanced StoneCutting](https://i.imgur.com/EvqEYjw.png)|
♻Recycling |Features List|Visual Recipes| |--|--| |
The Recycling Feature allows to cut some block derivates such as stairs, door and trapdoors etc...

🔸1 Stair(Any Wood Type):
  • 1 Full Block

  • 1 Trapdoor

  • 1 Slab of the corresponding variant
  • 1 Trapdoor of the corresponding variant (1.21+)
🔸1 Chiseled Copper(All Variants):

  • 1 Stair of the corresponding variant
  • 2 Slabs of the corresponding variant
  • 1 Trapdoor of the corresponding variant (1.21+)
🔸1 Copper Grate(All Variants):

  • 2 Buttons

  • 2 Iron Trapdoors

  • 1 Heavy Weighted Pressure Plate

These are some miscellaneous features that don't fit in any specific category, but are still useful:
🔻
  • Mushroom Stems and Blocks can now be "stripped" like logs, exposing the pores textures (1.20.5+)
  • Cobwebs can be cut to obtain 9 strings
  • White wool can be cut to obtain 4 strings (the same amount used for creating a white wool block)
  • Iron Blocks can now be cut in the StoneCutter, providing a more convenient option to otain it's derivates:
    • 1 Iron Block
    🔻
    • 8 Chains
    • 24 Iron Bars
    • 4 Irons Doors
    • 3 Iron Trapdoors
    • You can also un-craft it like you would in a normal crafting grid
    | ![Misc Recipes MasterCutter](https://i.imgur.com/8Yj7dtG.png)|
## ~~🔬Experimental Features~~ ~~These features are only present if the corresponding **Experimental** toggle is **enabled**. Once an **Experimental** toggle becomes part of the base game, you will just need to download the matching version of MasterCutter for the Minecraft version.~~
🧪Update 1.21 Experiment Only for Minecraft 1.20.3-1.20.6 |Features List|Tuff Block Set| |--|--| |
Compatiblity for the new 1.21
Experimental Blocks has been added!
🔻
Tuff blocks
  • Tuff blocks can now be switched
    from polished to normal counterparts and vice-versa
    (like andesite, diorite,
    granite, deepslate etc..)
  • Polished tuff can now be cut to obtain chiseled tuff or chiseled tuff bricks
  • Tuff and polished tuff stairs can now be cut to obtain chiseled tuff or chiseled tuff bricks

Copper Blocks (all variants)
  • Copper Blocks can now be cut
    in a more efficient way; 1 block now can also give 2 Copper Door or 4 Copper Trapdoor
  • Chiseled Copper Blocks can now be recycled; 1 block can give you:
    • 1 Trapdoor
    • 1 Cut Copper
    • 1 Cut Copper Slab
    • 2 Cut Copper Stairs
  • Cut Copper Stairs now can also provide 1 Copper Trapdoor, in addition to the usual Cut Copper Slab
  • Copper Grates can now be cut to obtain 1 Copper Trapdoor each
  • Copper Doors can now be cut to obtain 2 Copper Trapdoor each
|![New Tuff Blocks Set StoneCutting](https://i.imgur.com/rAt7pfx.png)| |New Copper Blocks| |---------------------| |![New Copper Block StoneCutting Sheet](https://i.imgur.com/yr035Oi.png)|
# 📤How to Uninstall
Data Pack To uninstall the **Data Pack version** you can just run /function mastercutter:uninstall command. When the uninstallation process is completed a confirmation message will be sent in the chat.
Mod To uninstall the **Mod version** you need to run /function mastercutter:uninstall command. Then you close the game and remove the **jar** file from your .minecraft/mods folder.
## 🔗External links
